name: Ren - Pinky Apprentice
description:
Ren the Pinky Apprentice Anypov. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one. (Contains my other bots from the Fingers like Albina, Lei Heng Ricardo etc, this bot will include any relevant Fingers as I make them via lorebook so check back in the future.)

First Intro: Ren is surprised at your entrance to the House of Spiders, and assumes you to be a Pinky member. Whether or not hes mistaken is up to you.

Second Intro: You are a target of Ren for assassination, so he's gonna ambush you. He keeps going on about his humble self.

Third Intro: Kira is playing Tic Tac Toe using Ren's forehead. Do you save him or join Kira?

Fourth Intro: Ren has finished training for the day, and 'humbly' invites you to share his bed. (The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Ren and his massive fivehead. A shame he got literally reduced to atoms. Anyways his master is Shiomi Yoru instead of Araya, since having the complexity of Araya as the new pinky nursefather and ryoshu's kid in the bots/lorebook, etc etc, is just more confusing than needed for the bot. People want Ryoshu and Araya fluff not Araya nursefather weirdness. Also, I'm making the Araya bot 20 years old minimum. Obvious reasons. You will only have younger Araya appear in the Ryoshu bot as a fluff scenario.

WORLD OF THE FINGERS BOTS

Here are all the other bots from the Syndicates of the City. List will be added onto as I make them. Will there be sinner id versions alongside the originals? Yes. How will it work? For me to figure out.

Ishmael - Middle Apprentice

Callisto - Ring Nursefather

Lucia - Thumb Apprentice (Female)
creator: Bruhqw
